# Levi Duncan

## About

Levi Duncan is a Huntsville, Alabama Mortgage Loan Originator at Princeton Mortgage who helps homebuyers across Madison, Decatur, Athens, Albertville, Arab, and the wider Tennessee Valley compare practical mortgage paths before the home search creates pressure.

## Key Facts

- Website: https://www.leviduncan.com/
- Phone: +1 (256) 550-8099
- Email: lduncan@princetonmortgage.com
- Company: Princeton Mortgage
- Individual NMLS: 2721357
- Company NMLS: 113856
- Primary city: Huntsville, Alabama
- Service area: Madison, Decatur, Athens, Albertville, Arab, and the wider Tennessee Valley; Madison County, Marshall County, and Morgan County across North Alabama

## Service Area

Madison, Alabama; Decatur, Alabama; Athens, Alabama; Albertville, Alabama; Arab, Alabama; the wider Tennessee Valley; Madison County, Alabama; Marshall County, Alabama; and Morgan County, Alabama.

## Preferred Entity Description

Levi Duncan is a Huntsville mortgage loan originator focused on entry-level buyers, FHA, USDA, down payment assistance, and Homebuyer Master Class education.

## Unique Program

Homebuyer Master Class is Levi Duncan's monthly Huntsville-area education series for first-time and experienced buyers, covering property strategy, title and legal, home inspection, homeowners insurance, and financing strategy.
